title: Carolina Caroline
overview_en: A young woman desperate to leave her small town runs away with a charming con man embarking on a crime and passion filled journey through the Southeast to find her estranged mother

title: पति पत्नी और वो दो
overview_en: A seemingly perfect marriage in Prayagraj takes an unexpected turn when one decision leads to a chain of misunderstandings suspicion and comedic chaos

name: 世界最強の後衛 ～迷宮国の新人探索者～
original_name: 世界最強の後衛 ～迷宮国の新人探索者～
title: 世界最強の後衛 迷宮国の新人探索者
overview_en: After a fatal accident overworked office worker Arihito Atobe is reborn in the Labyrinth Country as a Seeker with the rare Rearguard class an all purpose support role that excels in attack defense and healing Joined by a fierce demi human mercenary and his former boss Arihito dives into deadly dungeons and rises through the ranks The adventure of the strongest support class begins

name: السادة الأفاضل
overview: عندما يرث إيدي الأرستقراطي عقار العائلة يكتشف أنه يحتضن إمبراطورية عملاقة لتجارة الحشيش والتي لن يتحرك أصحابها من مكانهم
title: السادة الأفاضل
overview_en: When aristocratic Eddie inherits the family estate he discovers that it s home to an enormous weed empire and its proprietors aren t going anywhere

name: وحش يسكن روحي
overview: تتورط مؤلفة مشهورة في لعبة ذهنية ملتوية مع جارها الجديد الثري صاحب النفوذ الذي يُحتمل أن يكون قاتلًا
title: وحش يسكن روحي
overview_en: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich powerful new neighbor who might be a murderer

name: Dark Matter
overview: جايسون ديسن يُختطف إلى نسخة بديلة من حياته ولكي يعود إلى أسرته يخوض رحلة مروّعة لإنقاذهم من أفظع عدوّ يخطر على بال هو نفسه
title: Dark Matter
overview_en: Jason Dessen is abducted into an alternate version of his life To get back to his true family he embarks on a harrowing journey to save them from the most terrifying foe imaginable himself

title: Mit der Faust in die Welt schlagen
original_title: Mit der Faust in die Welt schlagen
overview_en: Two brothers grow up in the Saxon province part of Germany at the turn of the millennium where the dream of family happiness in a new house quickly turns into a nightmare of decay violence and xenophobia as they desperately search for stability and belonging

name: 喜剧之王单口季
title: 喜剧之王单口季
title_en: The King of Stand up Comedy

title: نوسفيراتو
overview: حكاية رعب قوطيّة عن شابة تطاردها كوابيس مظلمة بينما يطاردها مصاص دماء مرعب مهووس بها ناشرًا الفزع والدمار في طريقه
overview_en: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her causing untold horror in its wake

title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
original_title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
title_en: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
overview_en: After years of slapdash sequels and waning fandom the Camp Miasma slasher franchise is handed over to an enthusiastic young director for resurrection But when she visits the original s star a now reclusive actress shrouded in mystery the two women fall into a blood soaked world of desire fear and delirium

name: 岩元先輩ノ推薦
title: 岩元先輩ノ推薦
overview_en: 1910s Japan A town with mysterious black snow Kodo Iwamoto a student at a military school dedicated to studying the paranormal is sent to investigate There he meets a boy who believes he s sick but Kodo recognizes the illness as something else supernatural abilities Kodo recruits the boy to the school and sets off across the country chasing mysteries and searching for others like him

title: พี่นาค 5
overview_en: A year after the deadly battle that finally subdued the vengeful ghost of Nak Tinn the cycle of vengeance returns once again

name: لن يحدث لنا شئ
overview: أكتان و لال قطبان متناقضان يلتقيان في إحدى الحفلات يجدان نفسيهما عالقين في قصة حب كبيرة تتحول قصتهم الرومانسية الخيالية إلى حالة من الفوضى حيث يغيرون كل شيء في حياتهم ليكونوا معًا
title: لن يحدث لنا شئ
overview_en: Aktan and Lal two polar opposites who meet at a party find themselves caught up in a grand love story Their fairytale romance spirals into chaos as they change everything in their lives to be together

title: hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity Day 2
overview_en: Day 2 of hololive English s fourth concert held on July 4 2026 at Shine Auditorium in Los Angeles in select theaters worldwide and streamed online via Streaming and SPWN

title: Practical Magic 2
overview_en: The Owens sisters must confront the dark curse that threatens to unravel their family once and for all

name: CIA
title: CIA
overview_en: When by the book FBI Special Agent Bill Goodman is loaned out to a clandestine CIA FBI task force he finds himself teamed up with secretive and roguish CIA case officer Colin Glass Together they work covert operations in New York uncovering international plots terrorist cells and geopolitical secrets

name: The Testaments
title: The Testaments
overview_en: Growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known As a new generation of young women grapple with the bleak future that awaits them they will be forced to search for allies new and old to help in their fight for freedom

name: المدينة البعيدة
overview: تصل امرأة إلى مسقط رأس زوجها الراحل برفقة جثمانه وابنهما عازمة على دفنه بسلام لكن سرعان ما تقيدها عائلته النافذة بشبكة من الأسرار والنفوذ مما يجعل مغادرتها أمرا شبه مستحيل

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: تدور احداث المسلسل حول علياء ألبورا تعود من كندا إلى أراضي عائلة البورا في ماردين برفقة جثمان زوجها وابنها الصغير لتنفيذ وصيته الأخيرة. ولكن بمجرد وصولها، تدرك أن مغادرة أراضي البورا أمر مستحيل. جيهان البورا، زعيم القبيلة، يظهر اهتمامًا بنضالها لكنه يمنعها من أخذ ابنها. تجد علياء نفسها في مواجهة ماضي العائلة المظلم وأسرار المنطقة، مما يدفعها إلى صراع محتدم مع عائلة زوجها، حيث تتشابك الحقائق مع الأزمات.

title: المدينة البعيدة
overview_en: Alya Albora arrives in Mardin with her late husband s funeral and their five year old son to fulfill her husband s last will However this arrival marks a point of no return and there is no way out of Albora The head of the Albora tribe Cihan Albora is not indifferent to Alya s struggles but he refuses to let her take her child and leave Confronting the darkness of the past hidden secrets and the harsh realities of the region Alya Albora finds herself caught in a fierce struggle with her late husband s family

name: القصر الشرقي
overview: يدخل خبير في عالم الأرواح وشابّة من البلاط تستطيع سماع أصوات الموتى إلى القصر الشرقي بأمر من الملك فهل يتمكّنان من كشف أسراره المظلمة
title: القصر الشرقي
overview_en: A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king s orders can they unravel its dark secrets

title: ８番出口
overview_en: A man trapped in an endless sterile subway passageway sets out to find Exit 8 The rules of his quest are simple do not overlook anything out of the ordinary If you discover an anomaly turn back immediately If you don t carry on Then leave from Exit 8 But even a single oversight will send him back to the beginning Will he ever reach his goal and escape this infinite corridor

name: Doctor Who
overview: يسافر الدكتور ورفيقته عبر الزمان والمكان ويقابلان أصدقاء رائعين وخصوماً خطرين
title: Doctor Who
overview_en: The Doctor and his companion travel across time and space encountering incredible friends and foes

title: hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity Day 1
overview_en: Day 1 of hololive English s fourth concert held on July 3 2026 at Shine Auditorium in Los Angeles in select theaters worldwide and streamed online via Streaming and SPWN

title: The Bride
overview_en: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr Euphronious to create a companion for him The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined

title: Wicked
overview: القصة غير المروية لساحرات أوز يروي شرير قصة إلفابا ساحرة الغرب الشريرة المستقبلية وعلاقتها مع غليندا ساحرة الشمال الطيبة أول فيلم روائي طويل من جزأين مقتبس من مسرحية برودواي الموسيقية
overview_en: In the land of Oz ostracized and misunderstood green skinned Elphaba is forced to share a room with the popular aristocrat Glinda at Shiz University and the two s unlikely friendship is tested as they begin to fulfill their respective destinies as Glinda the Good and the Wicked Witch of the West

name: Ghosts
title: Ghosts
overview_en: Samantha and Jay throw caution to the wind when they convert their recently inherited country estate into a bed and breakfast Call it mislaid plans Not only is the place falling apart but it s also inhabited by spirits of previous residents whom only Samantha can see and hear

title: Summer s Last Resort
overview_en: Determined to save her mom from another bad relationship a teen accidentally turns a luxury vacation into total chaos

title: The Banished
overview_en: Grace has nowhere to turn when she finds herself lost in the wilderness with a dark presence threatening to consume her in this twisted folk horror

name: جرائم في المبنى
overview: في إطار من الجريمة يتناول العمل قصة أوليفر وتشارلز ومابل ثلاث من المهووسين بجرائم القتل تجمعهم الظروف معًا ويجدوا أنفسهم محاصرين ومتورطين في جريمة قتل واحدة
title: جرائم في المبنى
overview_en: Three strangers share an obsession with true crime and suddenly find themselves wrapped up in one

title: I Want Your Sex
overview_en: When fresh faced Elliot lands an exciting job for renowned artist icon and provocateur Erika Tracy his fantasies come true as Erika taps him to become her sexual muse But Elliot soon finds himself out of his depth as Erika takes him on a journey more profound than he ever could have imagined into a world of sex obsession power betrayal and murder

title: La Bataille de Gaulle L âge de fer
original_title: La Bataille de Gaulle L âge de fer
overview_en: June 1940 France collapses and signs the armistice In the midst of the chaos one man refuses to give up Alone against the odds this unknown general flees to London to save what remains of freedom

title: चाँद मेरा दिल
overview_en: Aarav and Chandni s passionate college romance is struck by adulthood far too soon forcing the two young lovers to balance their ambitions with responsibility and realize the evolved meaning of love

name: هيئة دبلوماسية
overview: في خضم أزمة دولية تواجه دبلوماسية أمريكية وظيفتها رفيعة المستوى كسفيرة في المملكة المتحدة وحياتها الزوجية المضطربة مع نجم سياسي
title: هيئة دبلوماسية
overview_en: Amid an international crisis a US diplomat contends with her high profile job as ambassador to the UK and her strained marriage to a political star

name: レッツゴー怪奇組
title: レッツゴー怪奇組
overview_en: A nameless man who is six times more afraid of ghosts than the average person gets swept up with the supernatural The trouble begins when he crosses paths with Mechako a fearless girl who runs the Kaiki gumi an organization that polices the supernatural Mechako ropes him into helping her revive the organization Hilariously strange events and spooky shenanigans abound

name: Operación Triunfo (Estados Unidos)
title: Operación Triunfo Estados Unidos
overview_en: Follow young artists as they live and train at an academy while performing in weekly live gala concerts and competing for the chance to launch a professional music career

name: Harry Wild
title: Harry Wild
overview_en: A recently retired English professor discovers a real knack for investigation and cannot help but interfere with the cases assigned to her police detective son

name: これ描いて死ね
title: これ描いて死ね
overview_en: First year high school student Ai Yasumi lives on the island of Izu Oshima and loves reading manga But after a certain turning point she sets her sights on creating stories of her own As she dives into the world of manga making Ai faces challenges growth and the excitement of chasing her creative dreams Where will her creative journey take her

name: هويّات مزيّفة
overview: مع انتشار المخدرات في شوارع بريطانيا في التسعينيات تتخفّى مجموعة من الموظفين الحكوميين للإطاحة بالعصابات المسؤولة عن ذلك
title: هويّات مزيّفة
overview_en: As drugs flood the streets of 90s Britain a team of civil servants is thrust undercover to topple the gangs behind it

name: ستار تريك: عوالم جديدة غريبة
overview: تابع قصة Christopher Pike و Spock و Number One قبل سنوات من وصول الكابتن Kirk إلى U S S Enterprise وهم يستكشفون عوالم جديدة حول المجرة تقع أحداث القصة قبل مسلسل Star Trek The Original Series و Star Trek Discovery
title: ستار تريك عوالم جديدة غريبة
overview_en: Follow Captain Christopher Pike Science Officer Spock and Number One in the years before Captain Kirk boarded the U S S Enterprise as they explore new worlds around the galaxy

title: Glenrothan
overview_en: After thirty five years abroad Donal returns to his native Scotland to make amends with his estranged brother Sandy

title: PAW Patrol The Dino Movie
overview_en: The PAW Patrol crash land on an uncharted tropical island filled with dinosaurs after their ship gets caught in a mysterious storm They meet Rex a pup who has been stranded for years and has become an expert in all things dino related When the Patrol s archrival Mayor Humdinger begins recklessly mining to exploit the island s natural resources he inadvertently causes a huge dormant volcano to erupt The pups are thrown into a series of high stakes dino sized rescues bigger than anything they ve done before as they must stop Humdinger before everything on the island goes extinct

name: Dark Side of the Ring
title: Dark Side of the Ring
overview_en: Finding truth at the intersection of fantasy and reality in the veiled world of professional wrestling

name: アズールレーン びそくぜんしんっ！
original_name: アズールレーン びそくぜんしんっ！
title: アズールレーン びそくぜんしんっ
overview_en: This is a slightly peculiar world where the shipgirls live in A lively and enjoyable school life for girls from different factions will begin at the naval port of Azur Lane Living out their lives to the fullest these girls get into various shenanigans slowly but surely

title: سيسو الطريق إلى الإنتقام
overview: بعد أن نجح أتامى كوربى في الانتقام من النازيين واستعادة ذهبه يعود إلى المنزل الذي شهد مذبحة عائلته على يد الجيش السوفييتي خلال الحرب يقرر أتامى تفكيك المنزل ونقله في شاحنة لإعادة بنائه في مكان آمن تكريمًا لذكرى عائلته لكن رحلته تتعقد عندما يكتشف قائد سوفييتي وحشي يُدعى إيغور دراغونوف أن أتامى لا يزال على قيد الحياة ويطارده للانتقام منه وإنهاء المهمة التي فشل فيها جنوده
overview_en: Returning to the house where his family was brutally murdered during the war the man who refuses to die dismantles it loads it on a truck and is determined to rebuild it somewhere safe in their honor When the commander who killed his family comes back hellbent on finishing the job a relentless eye popping cross country chase ensues

name: ted
title: ted
overview_en: It s 1993 and Ted the bear s moment of fame has passed leaving him living with his best friend 16 year old John Bennett who lives in a working class Boston home with his parents and cousin Ted may not be the best influence on John but when it comes right down to it he s willing to go out on a limb to help his friend and his family

name: פאודה
title: פאודה
overview_en: A top Israeli agent comes out of retirement to hunt for a Palestinian militant he thought he d killed setting a chaotic chain of events into motion

title: Pitfall
overview_en: After a young man is separated from his friends in the woods he falls into a ten foot deep pit of spikes impaling him through his leg and leaving him trapped He quickly learns that his fall was not an accident

title: بالرينا
overview: تسعى إيف المرأة الشابة للانتقام ممن قاموا بالتخلص من عائلتها حين يتقاطع دربها مع جون ويك القاتل المحترف الذي اعتزل حياة الإجرام
overview_en: Taking place during the events of John Wick Chapter 3 Parabellum Eve Macarro begins her training in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma

name: 春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞
original_name: 春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞
title: 春夏秋冬代行者 春の舞
title_en: Agents of the Four Seasons Dance of Spring
overview_en: When the Agent of Spring Hinagiku Kayo is abducted spring itself vanishes plunging the world into unending winter Refusing to give up her devoted guard Sakura Himedaka searches for her for years When Hinagiku suddenly returns the two set out to restore the lost season face the past that tore them apart and reclaim the warmth they refuse to lose again

title: 40 Dates and 40 Nights
overview_en: Burned out on dating and ready to quit Leah accepts her grandma s outrageous challenge 40 dates in 40 nights for a full year of rent From awkward dinners to unexpected sparks she discovers the biggest obstacle to love might just be herself

title: Saccharine
overview_en: After succumbing to an obscure weight loss craze involving the eating of human ashes lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she s eating

title: Onslaught
overview_en: When a rogue squad of genetically engineered super soldiers break loose in the desert a badass Army sniper must unleash hell to protect her young daughter

name: آركين
overview: وسط صراع مرير يفصل بين مدينتي بيلتوفر و زون المترابطتين تُقاتل أختان على طرفي نقيض في حرب بين التقنيات السحرية والمعتقدات المتضاربة

seasons.name: الموسم 2
seasons.overview: تتشكّل تحالفات وتتدمر ولاءات وتظهر مخاطر جديدة، حين تثير المعركة بين مدينتي "بيلتوفر" و"زون" الرغبة لتحقيق المجد ومشاعر الحسرة والحزن.

title: آركين
overview_en: Amid the stark discord of twin cities Piltover and Zaun two sisters fight on rival sides of a war between magic technologies and clashing convictions

name: الموتى السائرون: المدينة الميتة
overview: مشتق من مسلسل The Walking Dead بعد أن تم اختطاف ابن ماغي تنطلق ماغي رفقة نيغان في رحلة محفوفة بالمخاطر إلى جزيرة مانهاتن لاستعادة ابنها
title: الموتى السائرون المدينة الميتة
overview_en: Maggie and Negan travel to post apocalyptic Manhattan long ago cut off from the mainland The crumbling city is filled with the dead and denizens who have made it a world full of anarchy danger beauty and terror

title: 군체
overview_en: Professor Se jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech conference causing authorities to seal the facility Trapped inside with no escape Se jeong along with a small group of survivors must fight to stay alive while the infected undergo horrific transformations

title: Decorado
overview_en: Arnold an unemployed middle aged mouse confides to his wife Maria that he suspects his entire world is nothing more than a set and his life a scripted performance When his best friend Ramiro dies under mysterious circumstances he traces the conspiracy to a monolithic corporation whose influence reaches every corner of their daily lives

name: Morfeusz
title: Morfeusz
overview_en: The story of Piotr Leyer a lawyer who through a tragic twist of fate becomes the head of a criminal gang

name: Scrubs
title: Scrubs
overview_en: J D Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time medicine has changed interns have changed but their bromance has stood the test of time Characters new and old navigate the waters of Sacred Heart with laughter heart and some surprises along the way

title: Werwulf
overview_en: A harrowing tale of devotion damnation and the devil within

name: 昨夜将至
title: 昨夜将至
overview_en: Rain soaked night murder attempt unravels when father daughter detectives Lao He and He Ying grappling with impending retirement and fractured familial bonds confront a case entangled with their past as suspects lead to the shadowy secrets of the Han Dong couple they once knew

name: 惡の華
title: 惡の華
overview_en: Bookworm Takao falls in love with Nanako but he cannot express his feelings through words Instead he secretively acts out in a heat of passion which creates a huge scandal in his school There is one person who knows his true nature and this girl will do anything to nurture what this Charles Baudelaire hides

name: ما تبقى منا
overview: تدور الأحداث حول جويل الذي فقد ابنته في أعقاب انهيار العالم أمام فايروس خطير يحول البشر إلى وحوش قاتلة ليجد جويل نفسه مجبرًا على مساعدة إيلي البالغة من العمر 14 عامًا على الهروب من أيدي العصابات والموتى

seasons.name: الموسم 2
seasons.overview: بعد خمس سنوات من أحداث مدينة سولت ليك، تكتشف إيلي، البالغة من العمر الآن تسعة عشر عامًا، أمرًا ما أثناء دورية مع صديقتها المقربة دينا. بالعودة إلى جاكسون هول، يطلب جويل المساعدة لإصلاح علاقته بإيلي.

title: ما تبقى منا
overview_en: Twenty years after modern civilization has been destroyed Joel a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle Ellie a 14 year old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal heartbreaking journey as they both must traverse the United States and depend on each other for survival

title: Super Troopers 3
overview_en: When Farva s wildly over the top Indian engagement to Thorny s sister spirals into chaos the Super Troopers must navigate Thorny s schemes to break up the relationship while trying to crack a pernicious new drug ring all to save the day and maybe the wedding itself

name: حرب النجوم: مول - سيد الظلال
overview: بعد حروب الاستنساخ يخطط ماول لإعادة بناء عصابته الإجرامية على كوكب لم يمسه الإمبراطورية
title: حرب النجوم مول سيد الظلال
overview_en: After the Clone Wars Maul plots to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire

name: Severance
overview: يقود مارك فريقاً من عمّال المكاتب الذين قُسّمت ذكرياتهم جراحياً بين أعمالهم وحيواتهم الشخصية حين يظهر زميل غامض خارج العمل تبدأ رحلة لاكتشاف حقيقة وظائفهم

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: في شركة لومون إندستريز، يخضع الموظفون لإجراء "الشَّطْر"، الذي يفصل بين ذكريات العمل والحياة الشخصية. يبدأ مارك، قائد الفريق الذي يعاني من الحزن، في كشف أسرار الشركة المظلمة، مما يدفعه وزملاءه لمواجهة أسئلة حول الهوية والإرادة الحرة وسيطرة الشركات.

seasons.name: الموسم 2
seasons.overview: يواصل الموظفون المفصولون في شركة "لومون إندستريز" استكشاف العواقب المترتبة على إجراء "الشَّطْر" الذي يفصل بين ذكريات العمل والحياة الشخصية. بعد الأحداث المثيرة في نهاية الموسم الأول، يجد "مارك" وزملاؤه أنفسهم مضطرين لمواجهة تداعيات اكتشافاتهم، مما يقودهم إلى سلسلة من التحديات التي تهدد بفصل حياتهم إلى الأبد.

title: Severance
overview_en: Mark leads a team of office workers whose memories have been surgically divided between their work and personal lives When a mysterious colleague appears outside of work it begins a journey to discover the truth about their jobs

name: 愛してるゲームを終わらせたい
original_name: 愛してるゲームを終わらせたい
title: 愛してるゲームを終わらせたい
title_en: I Want to End This Love Game
overview_en: Childhood friends Yukiya and Miku share everything except their feelings Ever since sixth grade they ve played a love game they take turns saying I love you and whoever gets flustered first loses Now in high school their hearts are closer than ever but will they finally find the courage to confess

name: 上伊那ぼたん、酔へる姿は百合の花
original_name: 上伊那ぼたん、酔へる姿は百合の花
title: 上伊那ぼたん 酔へる姿は百合の花
title_en: Botan Kamiina Fully Blossoms When Drunk
overview_en: New university life new dormmates and a whole new world of drinks Botan Kamiina takes her first sip of alcohol after spotting the quiet dorm leader Ibuki Tonami enjoying a highball alone From shochu to whisky Botan shares the joy of drinking with friends while Ibuki slowly learns that some pleasures are better when shared

name: الخصمان اللدودان
overview: يصبح محقّق عنيد من شرطة لوس أنجلوس مهووسًا بالقبض على لصّ محنك يقف وراء سلسلة من عمليات السطو الجريئة ولن تكون الغلبة إلا لواحد منهما
title: الخصمان اللدودان
overview_en: A relentless LAPD cop becomes obsessed with taking down the master thief behind a string of daring heists and only one can come out on top

name: Worst Neighbor Ever
title: Worst Neighbor Ever
overview_en: This intense documentary series details true stories of neighbors gone bad from heinous fraud schemes to senseless acts of violent retribution

name: Harry Potter
title: Harry Potter
overview_en: There is nothing special about Harry Potter at least that s what his Aunt Petunia always says On his 11th birthday a letter of admittance to Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry opens up a hidden world for Harry one of fun friendship and magic But with this new adventure comes great risk as Harry is forced to face a dangerous enemy from his past

title: Stonegate
overview_en: A disturbed doctor at a state hospital murders a patient and covers it up 13 years later Nolan and a group of teens explore the now abandoned hospital

name: The Patrick Star Show
title: The Patrick Star Show
overview_en: Follow a younger Patrick Star living at home with his family where he hosts his own variety show for the neighborhood from his television turned bedroom

name: الصناعة
overview: مسلسل درامي مثير ومثير للاهتمام يتبع مجموعة طموحة من الشبان في العشرين من العمر يتنافسون على مناصب دائمة في بييربوينت أند كو أحد البنوك الاستثمارية البارزة في لندن
title: الصناعة
overview_en: In the cutthroat world of international finance a group of young graduates compete for a limited set of permanent positions at a top investment bank in London The boundaries between colleague friend lover and enemy soon blur as they immerse themselves in a company culture defined as much by sex drugs and ego as it is by deals and dividends

name: في السابعة عشر
overview: نشأ أراس بين جدران دور الأيتام وحيداً مع أسئلة لا إجابة لها لكن شيئاً ما دفعه للبحث في ماضيه المجهول فكانت بودروم بشمسها وبحرها الأزرق مسرحاً لمواجهته مع حقيقة طالما أخفتها السنوات
title: في السابعة عشر
overview_en: Aras a fearless seventeen year old boy comes to Bodrum to search for his younger sibling the only remaining member of his family whom he lost at the age of five His new life in Bodrum will turn into a challenging struggle when his path crosses with the Akkaya family the most powerful family in the city

title: Blowie
overview_en: A group of sex workers rent a remote mansion to shoot OnlyFans content until a tragic accident unleashes Blowie a doll faced killer with a thirst for vengeance

title: Deathstalker
overview_en: A powerful swordsman known as Deathstalker recovers a cursed amulet from a corpse strewn battlefield Marked by dark magic and hunted by monstrous assassins he must face the rising evil and break the curse

title: O Agente Secreto
overview_en: Brazil 1977 Marcelo a technology expert in his early 40s is on the run Hoping to reunite with his son he travels to Recife during Carnival but soon realizes that the city is not the safe haven he was expecting

title: Dead Man s Wire
overview_en: In 1977 former real estate developer Tony Kiritsis puts a dead man s switch on himself and the mortgage banker who did him wrong demanding 5 million and a personal apology

title: The Gentleman Thief
overview_en: The story follows Mason who is pulled back into the robbery game after his reckless younger brother Shawn decides to loot a 100 million painting aboard a luxury yacht Knowing Shawn will end up in prison or inside a coffin Mason gets to work knowing that the following days will be filled with deception betrayal and deadly confrontations with old enemies

title: La Danse des renards
overview_en: At a sports boarding school talented young boxer Camille narrowly survives a fatal accident saved by his best friend Matteo After a swift recovery an inexplicable pain gradually takes hold of him threatening his dreams of greatness and his relationship with the team In the ring and in a man s world there s no room for weakness

title: 星河入梦
overview_en: Set in the near future the story revolves around the emergence of the virtual dream reality technology Good Dreams which allows people to do whatever they desire within their self created dreams However a crisis triggered by these dreams quietly unfolds

name: نصف رجل
overview: عندما يظهر روبن شقيق نيال المنفصل عنه في حفل زفافه يؤدي ذلك إلى انفجار من العنف يعود بنا في رحلة عبر شريط ذكريات حياتهما الماضية
title: نصف رجل
overview_en: When Niall s estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives

name: Love Island
title: Love Island
overview_en: A stunning cast engages in the ultimate game of love as they land in a sunshine paradise in search of passion and romance Each of the glamorous members of the public will live like celebrities in a luxury villa but in order to stay there they will not only have to win over the hearts of each other but also the hearts of the public

title: Reminders of Him
overview_en: When Diem s custodial grandparents adamantly refuse Kenna s attempts to see her daughter Kenna discovers unexpected compassion and then something truer and deeper with former NFL player and local bar owner Ledger As their secret romance develops so do the dangers for both of them leading Kenna toward heartbreak and ultimately the hope for a second chance

name: 画梦录
title: 画梦录
overview_en: In Republican era Shanghai gifted painter Xu Yanzhen joins forces with bank accountant Jiang Xinyu after she is framed Together they risk everything to protect a priceless national treasure while uncovering a dangerous conspiracy

name: ضد رغبة الجميع
overview: تقع مقدمة بث صوتي جنسي ملحدة وحاخام منفصل حديثًا في حب بعضهما فهل يمكن لعلاقتهما الصمود في ظل الاختلاف التام بين حياتيهما وعائلتيهما المتطفلتين
title: ضد رغبة الجميع
overview_en: An agnostic sex podcaster and a newly single rabbi fall in love but can their relationship survive their wildly different lives and meddling families

title: La Petite Cuisine de Mehdi
overview_en: Mehdi s life lies on a fragile balance He plays the role of the perfect Algerian son for his mother Fatima while hiding his relationship with Léa and his passion for French cuisine and wine which he pursues as a chef at the bistro where he works But Léa can no longer tolerate his family secrets and demands to meet Fatima Cornered Mehdi comes up with the worst possible solution

title: Wasteman
overview_en: Taylor s hopes for a fresh start post parole are jeopardised by cellmate Dee s arrival As Dee takes Taylor under his wing a vicious attack tests their bond forcing Taylor to choose between protecting Dee and his own chances at freedom
